# Request Processing Flow

The request processing flow in the Azion platform follows this sequence:

```
Client Request
    ↓
Edge Node
    ↓
Application
    ↓
Rules Engine
    ↓
Function Instance
    ↓
Function Execution
    ↓
Origin / Storage / Response
```

This page is a placeholder and will be expanded with detailed documentation.
